sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 5:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 5:1
items.html: Because of the form of the will to receive that was innovated with the upper light, since it wants to bestow, that innovated part that was innovated went out from the state of Emanator and came into the state of emanated being. (Inner Observation, item 11 & item 15)
